steps.title: Cryptography and Go Predict Crypto Go Hsm Kms Boundary · Theory Crypto Go Hsm Kms Boundary
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory cryptographic engineering team handles case 7082 during a post-quantum compatibility canary. Build deterministic Go evidence to enforce immutable key identity, state, cryptoperiod, least privilege, and tested recovery; retain exact canonical bytes, purpose, role, version, and artifact identity; then swap the role, tenant, recipient, algorithm, or context and prove domain separation. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Design an interface for non-exportable HSM or KMS operations and state what attestation, latency, quota, availability, and audit evidence remains external.
